subject: muscular three-eyed humanoid fighter in martial arts stance, energy aura visible
description: A heavily muscular humanoid figure with a bald head and three eyes stands in a wide combat stance, arms raised defensively or ready to strike. A glowing green-yellow energy aura radiates around the figure. The figure wears an open martial arts top showing musculature. The three-eye feature and martial arts context, combined with the card name, identify this as Tien Shinhan from Dragon Ball Super.
foreground: muscular three-eyed bald fighter, energy aura
